zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret MacLeod of Lewis於1350年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾易斯萊 易曼德時，她的父親Roderick "Ruaidhri Mor" MacLeod 5th Of Lewis18歲，母親Margaret MacDonald31歲。她於大約1365年與William Mackintosh 7th of Mackintosh, 8th of Chattan結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1430年在蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾度巴頓享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret MacLeod of Lewis于1350年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾易斯萊 易曼德时，她的父亲Roderick "Ruaidhri Mor" MacLeod 5th Of Lewis18岁，母亲Margaret MacDonald31岁。她于大约1365年与William Mackintosh 7th of Mackintosh, 8th of Chattan结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1430年在苏格兰登巴頓史爾度巴頓享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: MacLeod
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McLeod
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Leòid ‘son of Leòd’, a patronymic from a Gaelic form of Old Norse Liótr ‘ugly’, a common personal name in medieval Norway and Iceland.

History: This is the name of a major Scottish Hebridean clan, associated in particular with Dunvegan on the isle of Skye; also, historically, with the island of Lewis. There are two main branches: the McLeods of Harris and Dunvegan (Sìol Tormoid) and the McLeods of Lewis (Sìol Torcaill). Both branches claim descent from a certain Leòd (Norse: Liótr), who lived in the 13th century. — One prominent bearer of this prominent Scottish name, Alexander McLeod (1774–1833), a Reformed Presbyterian clergyman, author, and editor, emigrated to the US in 1792 from the island of Mull in the Hebrides.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret MacLeod of Lewis was born in 1350, in Islay Island, Argyll, Scotland, her father, Roderick "Ruaidhri Mor" MacLeod 5th Of Lewis, was 18 and her mother, Margaret MacDonald, was 31. She married William Mackintosh 7th of Mackintosh, 8th of Chattan about 1365. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in 1430, in Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret MacLeod of Lewis est née en 1350, à Islay Island, Argyll, Écosse, son père, Roderick "Ruaidhri Mor" MacLeod 5th Of Lewis, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Margaret MacDonald, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé William Mackintosh 7th of Mackintosh, 8th of Chattan environ 1365. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1430, à Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 80 ans.

Sie hat um 1365 William Mackintosh 7th of Mackintosh, 8th of Chattan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. ko.lifeSummary: Margaret MacLeod of Lewis(이)가 1350년 스컷랜드 아그이 이슬레이 이슬랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roderick "Ruaidhri Mor" MacLeod 5th Of Lewis(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret MacDonald(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1365년 William Mackintosh 7th of Mackintosh, 8th of Chattan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1430년 스컷랜드 던바토실르 드바턴에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Isle of Lewis, Ross-shire, Scotland, Uni: исл оф львис, росс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret MacLeod of Lewis родилась в 1350 г. в местности ислеи исланд, аргилл, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Roderick "Ruaidhri Mor" MacLeod 5th Of Lewis было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret MacDonald, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Mackintosh 7th of Mackintosh, 8th of Chattan около 1365 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1430 г. в местности думбартон, дунбартоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 80 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret MacLeod of Lewis nació en 1350, en Islay Island, Argyll, Scotland, su papá, Roderick "Ruaidhri Mor" MacLeod 5th Of Lewis, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Margaret MacDonald, tenía 31 años. Se casó con William Mackintosh 7th of Mackintosh, 8th of Chattan aproximadamente 1365. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1430, en Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, a la edad de 80 años.
